cleavage agent: Proteins were eluted by overnight cleavage by human rhinovirus 3C proteases
enrichment method: Affinity purification was performed using FLAG resin
fractionation method: further purified by SEC using a Superose 6 column
instrument: hybrid quadrupole Orbitrap LC-MS System, Q-Exactive PLUS
labeling: Samples were analyzed using ultra–high performance mass spectrometry
